notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Geraldo Perdomo. Corey Seager scores. Josh Jung to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Alejandro Osuna plunked
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Osuna hit by pitch. Ezequiel Duran to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Higashioka GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Higashioka grounds into a double play, third baseman Nolan Arenado to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Alejandro Osuna out at 3rd. Jake Burger to 2nd. Kyle Higashioka out at 1st.
